name: flank
description: The living competitor radar for B2B SaaS: always-on agents maintain versioned, citation-pinned dossiers and self-refreshing battlecards per rival, pushing only material deltas — what changed, why it matters, how to respond.

name: claimwatch
description: Patent & IP radar for IP-heavy startups: a weekly agent over USPTO/EPO/WIPO feeds maintains living dossiers per technology area and competitor — alerting on new filings, claim amendments, assignments, and lapses, every assertion checkable against the source.

name: inward
description: A voice-first journaling and reflection companion, verifiably airplane-mode functional — spoken thoughts are transcribed, reflected on, and stored only on the phone. Zero network in the journaling path.

name: ibrief
description: Selbstverbesserndes, personalisiertes Morning Briefing — lokal-first in Rust mit lokalen LLMs. Lernt Gewichte, Prompts und Quellen; Anti-Blase by design.

name: stringer
description: An always-on research desk for paid-newsletter operators: living beat wikis plus a daily citation-pinned delta brief, deduplicated against everything you've already published.

name: regdelta
description: A living, citation-pinned obligation map for SME compliance teams: an agent watches regulators in your jurisdictions daily and maintains an always-current, audit-ready wiki of what changed, who it affects, and what you must do by when.
